title: Method: pane.focus
text:
Method name: `pane.focus`

Parameters (REQUIRED):

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `selector` | string | REQUIRED | A pane selector string per [[RFC-0001:C-SELECTORS]]. |

The plugin MUST resolve the selector to exactly one pane.

If zero panes match, the plugin MUST return `no_match`.

If multiple panes match, the plugin MUST return `ambiguous_match`.

The plugin MUST call `focus_pane_with_id` with `should_float_if_hidden` set to `true`, bringing hidden floating panes into view.

On success, the response MUST contain `{"focused": "<pane_id>"}` where `<pane_id>` is the `terminal:N` or `plugin:N` identifier of the focused pane.

Rationale: Focus is a prerequisite for client-side capture (per [[ADR-0005]]) and close operations. Setting `should_float_if_hidden` to `true` ensures floating panes that are hidden behind tiled panes become visible — without this, focusing a hidden floating pane would succeed silently but the user would see no change. The method does not support `all` because focusing multiple panes simultaneously is not meaningful.
